title: Everbuild Forever Grey Anti-Mould Silicone Sealant – Permanently Waterproof – Suitable for Internal and External Use – Grey – 295ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
LONG-LASTING – With a 25% flexibility factor and a waterproof finish, Forever Clear is a superior hygienic silicone sealant for areas of high humidity.
IDEAL FOR AREAS OF HIGH HUMIDITY – From shower bases and cubicles to wet rooms; around baths, sinks, basins, and more – the waterproof cured product works perfectly in frequently damp areas.
VERSATILE – You can also use it in utility rooms, kitchens and all applications where the air is moist and maximum hygiene protection is required.
CONTAINS MOULD SHEILD – An independently tested ingredient that prevents mould growth for up to 10 years, tested under simulated ageing conditions.
ANTI-BACTERIAL PROPERTIES – Actively protects against the growth of bacteria, mildew and black mould that can commonly occur in high-humidity environments.
MULTIPLE COLOURS – Available in white, ivory, clear and grey to best suit your kitchen, bathroom or humid area decor.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? All surfaces to be sealed must be clean and dry. Always tool sealant down to ensure a proper bond is achieved. Tool within 15 minutes of applying. Fill bath half with water while sealing and curing to balance movement in plastic & acrylic baths. WHERE TO US IT? JOINTS ALWAYS IMMACULATE AND PROTECTED OVER TIME The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
